properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Narrow as the road may seem I'll follow where your spirit leads Broken as my life may be I will give You every piece

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I hear You call I am available I say yes Lord I am available

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Here I am with open hands Counting on Your grace again Less of me and more of You I just wanna see You move

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Here I am, here I am You can have it all You can have it all Here I am, here I am You can have it all You can have it all

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: For the one who gave me life Nothing is a sacrifice Use me how you want to God Have your throne within my heart
